genericContract: Declared self-contained conversation tasks require direct completion without inspect/action evidence; lexical heuristics are forbidden.

variants.hypothesis: Normalized membership in the two declared self-contained classes is the smallest safe policy.
Explicit grounded classes must override conversational declarations before allowlist evaluation.
A typed completion_mode=direct field is a stronger authority boundary than class inference.
Direct completion requires self-contained class plus proof_policy=none.
Direct completion requires self-contained class plus an explicitly empty required-capabilities set.
Direct completion requires self-contained class plus explicitly empty structured evidence requirements.
A registered answer_only route profile should own zero-tool and zero-proof policy.
A typed mode/reason/authority decision improves diagnostics while preserving fail-closed selection.
One policy-owned prompt/tool profile prevents inconsistent repeated policy evaluation.

sharedAssertions: no prompt text, filename, selector, or product string influences selection
source_investigation and runtime_inspection retain the natural tool loop
semantic, safety, proof, and grounded-completion regressions are zero
each candidate receives an independent artifact digest and Loop 4 proof
